## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Skill
- [ ] Catalog/search/routing
- [ ] Script
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Chore
- [ ] Fix

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and reviewable
- [ ] I preserved existing skill and catalog content unless intentionally improving it
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/validate_repo.py`
- [ ] I rebuilt the catalog if skill metadata changed

## Skill-specific checklist

- [ ] Skill has a clear name
- [ ] Skill has `SKILL.md`
- [ ] Trigger phrases are clear
- [ ] Use cases are documented

## Security/privacy checklist

- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or production credentials
- [ ] No private customer/project data
- [ ] No copied copyrighted content from other repos
- [ ] No unsafe shell commands or install scripts
- [ ] No unnecessary local-only absolute paths
